title: Stylogyne indecora
taxonomy: Stylogyne indecora is a species of flowering plant in the nightshade family, Solanaceae. It is native to South America. Stylogyne indecora belongs to the genus Stylogyne, which is a group of plants that are often found in tropical regions. The plant's classification is further broken down into the family Solanaceae and the order Solanales. Stylogyne indecora is a part of the kingdom Plantae.
